creator: silb@silb.no
text:
Created attachment 165324
SVN diff for upgrading audio/beets from 1.3.15 to 1.3.16

Beets 1.3.16 has been released [1].

The Beets project now has a new domain [2].

See the attached patch for upgrading the port.

[1] http://docs.beets.io/en/v1.3.16/changelog.html
[2] http://beets.io/
